revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24017044590|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月初一]][[zh:四月初一]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 1|qq=April 1}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} . == Events == * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1792|en|1792|qid=Q7805|lt=1792 AD|1=1792}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}} ) – At {{ill|Mount Unzen|en|Mount Unzen|qid=Q620860|lt=Unzen-dake|1=Mount Unzen}} , which had been erupting continuously since February, part of the mountain collapsed. Debris flowed into the {{ill|Shimabara Sea|ja|島原海|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135490377}} , triggering a {{ill|Tsunami|en|Tsunami|qid=Q8070|lt=tsunami|1=Tsunami}} , which also caused damage in {{ill|Higo Province|en|Higo Province|qid=Q259705|lt=Higo|1=Higo Province}} on the opposite shore (an event known as {{ill|1792 Unzen landslide and tsunami|en|1792 Unzen landslide and tsunami|qid=Q3591486|lt=Shimabara Great Higo Misfortune|1=1792 Unzen landslide and tsunami}} ). == Births == * {{ill|Shōan|ja|承安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōan|1=Shōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11076350}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1173|en|1173|qid=Q19688|lt=1173 AD|1=1173}} {{ill|May 14|en|May 14|qid=Q2561|lt=May 14|1=May 14}} ) – {{ill|Shinran|en|Shinran|qid=Q512934|lt=Shinran|1=Shinran}} , regarded as the founder of {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1262|en|1262|qid=Q5510|lt=1262 AD|1=1262}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|qid=Q7616|lt=1839 AD|1=1839}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}} ) – {{ill|San'yūtei Enchō|en|San'yūtei Enchō|qid=Q3494527|lt=Sanyutei Enchō|1=San'yūtei Enchō}} , a rakugo performer (d. {{ill|1900|en|1900|qid=Q2034|lt=1900 AD|1=1900}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868 AD|1=1868}} {{ill|April 23|en|April 23|qid=Q2527|lt=April 23|1=April 23}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harutoshi|en|Tokugawa Harutoshi|qid=Q728162|lt=Tokugawa Harunori|1=Tokugawa Harutoshi}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1816|en|1816|qid=Q6953|lt=1816 AD|1=1816}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870 AD|1=1870}} {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|qid=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}} ) – {{ill|Hamaguchi Osachi|en|Hamaguchi Osachi|qid=Q351661|lt=Hamaguchi Yūkō|1=Hamaguchi Osachi}} , the 27th Prime Minister of Japan (d. {{ill|1931|en|1931|qid=Q18782|lt=1931 AD|1=1931}} ). == Deaths == * [[Kangen]]{{efn|February 1243 to February 1247|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th Year (Leap April) ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1246|en|1246|qid=Q5441|lt=1246 AD|1=1246}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|qid=Q2575|lt=May 17|1=May 17}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Tsunetoki|en|Hōjō Tsunetoki|qid=Q2008076|lt=Hōjō Tsunetoki|1=Hōjō Tsunetoki}} , the 4th Regent of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (born {{ill|1224|en|1224|qid=Q5402|lt=1224 AD|1=1224}} ). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Mōka no Shun|ja|孟夏の旬|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōka no Shun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|30|4|2|3|1|5|4|0401|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
